final_response.answer:
Your travel preference has been successfully stored for future approval processes! 

The system now remembers your preferences under the key "travel_preference" within the scope "manager_travel_preferences". This will help streamline approvals when you make requests in the future, as we'll have a baseline of what to expect from you regarding destinations, dates, and accommodation types.

Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
